Hi, my name is

Natasha Koller

UX/UI Engineer, Accessibility & Diversity Chamption, & Teacher{" "}

I create beautiful and responsive websites and love creating media and projects to satisfy my clients to the fullest!





UI/UX Engineer

Accessibility champion with experience in prototyping and wireframing. Organized, designed design systems, developer guidelines.

Designer

I enjoy creating alluring design patterns while keeping in mind the user experience and intended audience. I enjoy creating: UX, UI, Web, Apps, Logos, and custom art{" "}

Design Tools: Figma, Canva, , Pen & Paper, canvas, watercolor and mixed media.

Front-end Developer

I like to create custom code and enjoy making custom CSS elements. I love experiementing and seeing how far I can take my ideas and make them possible on the browser! life in the browser.

Languages I can code: Angular, HTML, CSS, React.Js, some SCSS Dev Tools: Bootstrap, react-router v6, NPM, Linux Codepen, Github, Terminal

); } export default Home;
